org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.JsonMetaProvider

Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.

JSON Marshalling Support.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JcsSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to canonical JSON per RFC 8785 (JCS).

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonParser
    Parses any valid RFC 8259 JSON text into a POJO model.
    class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metadata to HTTP responses as JSON-Schema.
    static class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    class 
    JsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
    static class 
    JsonSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
